name: The Family
overview: The series takes place during the war of attrition and its aftermath, in a building and the relationship between its inhabitants, and about a family who loses their son in the war and its impact on them. It also deals with the issue of terrorism and poverty, which drives the poor to drift behind extremist groups.

trailers.title: مسلسل ״العائلة״ ׀ محمود مرسي – ليلى علوي ׀ الحلقة 01 من 28
